trades.reasoning: Score 95 with a textbook momentum setup: RSI 62.3 in the bullish zone, MACD crossover with a rising histogram, and price 5% above SMA-20 — all three signals aligned.
Score 95 with RSI 58.5 and full MACD bullish confirmation; low price at $9 allows meaningful share count within limited remaining cash.
Score 90 with RSI just entering the bullish zone at 56.1 and a fresh MACD crossover, suggesting early-stage momentum with room to run.

decisions.briefing: Markets dipped modestly today — NASDAQ -0.7%, S&P 500 -0.2% — a soft but non-alarming pullback with no clear directional catalyst. The portfolio is up 24.6% overall with 4 open slots and $843 in cash well above the $500 deploy threshold, so holding idle makes no sense. I'm filling three slots with the top score-95 and score-90 momentum names: FLY, TME, and STNE, all showing clean technical entry points before they get crowded.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities slipped modestly on Monday as investors adopted a wait-and-see posture ahead of upcoming economic data. The NASDAQ underperformed at -0.7% as growth and technology shares saw mild profit-taking after a strong recent run. The S&P 500 eased 0.2% in low-conviction trading, with no major macro catalysts to shift the neutral risk tone.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市周一溫和回落，投資者在等待即將公佈的宏觀數據前普遍觀望。納斯達克指數跌幅較大，下滑0.7%，主因成長型及科技股在近期強勁升勢後出現小幅獲利回吐。標普500指數則跌0.2%，成交量偏低，市場缺乏明確方向性催化劑，整體風險情緒維持中性。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing buys stocks that are already trending upward, betting that strong price action continues in the near term. Key signals include RSI between 55–70 (bullish but not yet overbought) and a MACD bullish crossover (shorter-term trend overtaking longer-term). Today's picks — FLY, TME, and STNE — all show this pattern, which is why they scored 90–95 on the screener.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略專門買入已呈上升趨勢的股票，押注強勢走勢在短期內持續。關鍵指標包括RSI介於55至70之間（看漲但尚未超買），以及MACD看漲交叉（短期趨勢突破長期趨勢線）。今日精選的FLY、TME和STNE均符合這一形態，因此在選股系統中獲得90至95的高分。
